name: Waun Fach via Grwyne Fawr
highlights: Trek to Waun Fach (811m), highest point of the Black Mountains.
viewpoints: Pen y Gadair Fawr twin summit; Sugar Loaf beyond
picnic_spots: By the reservoir or on Pen y Gadair Fawr
food_drink_nearby: The Red Lion Llanbedr; The Dragon's Head Crickhowell
hazards_notes: Very boggy plateau; featureless in cloud
